It's not just a Virtual Library

What You Get in One-Time Payment
Access valid till NEET-PG 2026.

24-Hour Google Meet Study Room

Access a live, always-on virtual study room with daily rankings to stay consistent and accountable with peers.

Dedicated Mental Health Support Whatsapp Group

Join our dedicated WhatsApp community for motivation, guidance, and emotional wellness during your preparation.

Mentorship Sessions

Get expert-led mentorship and guidance from experienced faculty and toppers.

Find Study Buddy

Pair up with other aspirants who match your study schedule, goals, and learning style.

Exam-Specific Discussion Groups

Interact with NEET-PG toppers and fellow aspirants in focused discussion groups.

Forest Group

Join focused silent study sessions inspired by the "Forest" app — stay productive together.

Early Bird & Night Owl Groups

Join communities that match your study timing — morning or late-night learners.

Only Girls Study Room

For the privacy and comfort of our female members, linked with an Only Girls WhatsApp Group.

Daily Yoga Session

Daily morning and evening 30-minute online yoga and meditation led by expert Yoga instructors.

24/7 Active

Google Meet Study Room.

(So join any time, be it in day or night.)

Community & Safety

A Safe and Supportive Virtual Library

Our Virtual Library Provides A Secure And Welcoming Space For Everyone. With 64% Of Our Members Being Female, We Emphasize Privacy And Ensure A Safe Environment For All Users.

Why Join This Virtual Space.

Feeling alone while preparing for your exam from home?
Struggling to stay consistent with your studies?
Don't have a study partner to keep you accountable?
Feeling low on motivation or overwhelmed?
Want expert guidance and support while you study?

Join us and transform your home study into a productive, focused, and motivating experience!
